# RusticIT

> Senior frontend consulting for B2B SaaS teams.

RusticIT is a consultancy led by Saulo Vargas, a senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience. We specialize in frontend architecture, TypeScript systems, and performance optimization for data-heavy B2B SaaS applications.

## Services

- Frontend Architecture & Stabilization
- TypeScript Systems that Stay Consistent
- Data-heavy UI Performance
- Modernization & Senior Embed

## Tech Stack

Vue.js, React, TypeScript, Astro
